framework.name: Agent identity as checksum of prompt+tools+config
framework.description: A-JWT hashes the agent's prompt, tool list, and configuration into a one-way checksum that becomes the agent's cryptographic identity. Detects in-process impersonation (one agent pretending to be another within the same client process) with <2ms overhead. This is the missing piece current session keys lack — binding delegation to WHAT the agent is, not just WHO it represents.
framework.raw_quote: A checksum-based client shim and an optional TEE attestation profile that detect in-process impersonation with < 2 ms overhead

source.title: Agentic JWT: A Secure Delegation Protocol for Autonomous AI Agents
